title: AWS CloudFormation Template
description: Represents the structure of an AWS CloudFormation template. A template is a JSON or YAML formatted text file that describes the AWS infrastructure and resources to provision. Templates can be used to create and update CloudFormation stacks.

AWSTemplateFormatVersion.description: The AWS CloudFormation template version that the template conforms to. The only valid value is 2010-09-09.

Description.description: A text string that describes the template.

Metadata.description: Objects that provide additional information about the template. Can include template-specific metadata such as AWS::CloudFormation::Interface.

Parameters.description: Values to pass to your template at runtime when you create or update a stack. Parameters enable you to customize stack creation.

Rules.description: Validates a parameter or a combination of parameters passed to a template during stack creation or update.

Mappings.description: A mapping of keys and associated values that you can use to specify conditional parameter values. Similar to a lookup table.

Conditions.description: Conditions that control whether certain resources are created or whether certain resource properties are assigned a value during stack creation or update.

Transform.description: For serverless applications, specifies the version of the AWS SAM to use. You can also use AWS::Include transforms to work with template snippets stored separately.

Resources.description: Specifies the stack resources and their properties, such as an Amazon EC2 instance or an Amazon S3 bucket. You must declare each resource separately.

Outputs.description: Describes the values that are returned whenever you view your stack's properties. Output values can be used for cross-stack references.

Type.description: The data type for the parameter.

Default.description: A value of the appropriate type for the template to use if no value is specified.

NoEcho.description: Whether to mask the parameter value to prevent it from being displayed.

AllowedValues.description: An array containing the list of values allowed for the parameter.

AllowedPattern.description: A regular expression that represents the patterns to allow for String types.

MaxLength.description: Maximum number of characters for String types.

MinLength.description: Minimum number of characters for String types.

MaxValue.description: Maximum numeric value for Number types.

MinValue.description: Minimum numeric value for Number types.

Description.description: A string that describes the parameter.

ConstraintDescription.description: A string that explains a constraint when the constraint is violated.

Rule.description: A rule that validates parameter values.

RuleCondition.description: Determines when a rule takes effect.

Resource.description: A resource declaration in the template.

DependsOn.description: Specifies that the creation of a specific resource follows another.

Condition.description: Associates a condition with the resource so that it is created only when the condition is true.

DeletionPolicy.description: Determines what happens to the resource when the stack is deleted.

UpdatePolicy.description: Specifies how CloudFormation handles updates to specific resources.

UpdateReplacePolicy.description: Determines what happens to the resource when it is replaced during a stack update.

CreationPolicy.description: Prevents a resource's status from reaching CREATE_COMPLETE until CloudFormation receives a specified number of success signals.

Metadata.description: Metadata to associate with the resource.

OutputDefinition.description: An output declaration in the template.

Description.description: A description of the output value.

Value.description: The value of the property returned by the aws cloudformation describe-stacks command.

Export.description: The name of the resource output to be exported for cross-stack reference.

Condition.description: Associates a condition with the output.
